title: BTC fell from 118,600 to 76,000, but my system still ended +30,000 points
author: Spirited_Syllabub488
selftext:
I wanted to share the result of my ML BTC system because the comparison is quite strong.

From **01-10-2026 to now**, BTC itself dropped from **118,600 to 76,000**, while my system finished **\~30,000 points positive** over the same period.

A few stats from the backtest of my system of few past years:

* **Sharpe ratio:** \> 3
* **CAGR:** 56%
* **Max drawdown:** \~25%
* **Trade frequency:** low
* **Style:** selective, disciplined, and built to avoid unnecessary trades

I’ve been trading this system since **September**, and what has stood out to me is how it behaves like a more structured, rules-based investment approach rather than a noisy trading setup. In a market like BTC, that kind of discipline can matter a lot.

The backtesting result of the system has shown a very good performance even it is the BEST among most of the unprofitable systems out there. And then I started deploying it in my real account and still it has proven its profitability.   
backtest report - [https://drive.google.com/file/d/1xwNisxVslkfPPY9g2rcbWt4shrI-9o4-/view?usp=drive\_link](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1xwNisxVslkfPPY9g2rcbWt4shrI-9o4-/view?usp=drive_link)  
  
But the only problem is that I am not able to use this model at its potential just becasue of low capital, that's why I am thinking to sell few copies of the system among serious traders. My goal is to work with people who understand the value of a systematic approach and want something built with a long-term edge in mind. If anyone is interested in my system feel free to direct ping me, I will be sharing the real trades data.

If you’re interested in my ML based BTC profitable system that is designed more like a premium investment model than a fast-trading signal product, I’m open to discussing it further.
